title: LEETOYI Porcelain Small Mortar and Pestle, Ceramic Herb Grinder Pill Crusher Set, 3.3 inch White
description:
About this item
New design:The size is 3.3" L x 1.8" H. This is the best combination. The mortar with a small cutout, which is very convenient for you to pour out the ground powder
Ceramic material:Unlike wooden materials, ceramic materials will not be moldy or hairy. If stored carefully, this Mortar and Pestle set can survive for many years
Practicability:Easily picked up with one hand, The porcelain mortar interior is unpolished and rough for better grinding. Also the ceramic mortar absorbs no flavor,can stick stuff you crush, easily to take out all you crush.You can also easily take out all you crush. Combine the small gaps on the porcelain to pour out easily
Different occasions: You can use it as a housewarming gift. At the same time, the classic white porcelain is not only suitable for family use, but also suitable for cafes, restaurants, parties, etc
Fun:Enjoy the fun of grinding and exercise children's patience
reviews_5s:
I got the smallest one and the biggest one which is also in the photo I added so you could see them side by side for comparison the biggest to smallest and the smallest is exactly what I needed. The biggest isn’t bad at all but for what I’m going for the smallest ended up working great. It fits perfectly in the palm of your hand. If you are looking for large amounts of medication to be crushed I would choose the larger one but if it’s smaller stuff then choose the little one. It’s light weight but is durable. Portable and easy to use. The larger one was also great to use. I was very happy with it when I used it. I am very happy I ordered it cuz now I have both options if I need them. Plus I know there will be days when I know I need the larger one so it’s a win win. Very happy with this product. The only issue I have is that things get stuck on the side and the only remedy I have found to that is using a plastic straw to get the excess off the sides. I’ve had to do that for years with any of these types of mortars. Plastic straw, always works. Just scrape it off the sides and it works like a gem. But I recommend this 100%. It’s a great buy for the sizes, price, durability and use. So glad I found it. Worth it!This mortar and pestle set is great!

It is small but very good quality. It's made of porcelain and has a nice weight. The outside is a very sleek white, but the inside seems to have very small grooves or some sort rough texture, similar to fine sandpaper, which aids in whatever you're grounding in it to be ground more effectively.

I purchased it specifically to use for grounding my cat's medications into powder form to put in her canned food, since I was tired of fighting to get pills down her throat, and running the risk of getting clawed or bitten. Before purchasing this, I was using a spoon to mash the pills but doing it that way still left the powder too coarse, which she was able to sniff out and would then refuse to eat the food, but this mortar and pestle grounds the pills much more thoroughly which creates a super fine powder that she doesn't seem to be able to detect. It makes giving her medication extremely easy.

I would definitely recommend this set to anyone who has a finicky pet who fights taking their medication.It's porcelain, so it's not as sophisticated as granite or marble types, and yet, it's well made. It reminds me of chemistry class, in high school, but it looks good enough to keep out in the open, on my kitchen counter. The pestle fits precisely into the curvature of the mortar. The pestle has a slightly flat nose, perfect for initial crushing. The mortar is large enough to crush one item first, and it leaves room enough for another item to crush at the same time (e.g., spice, herb, chemical, salt, etc.). Grind two or more items at once! Normal washing leaves it white. Awesome.I recently purchased this cute little white mortar and pestle, and I am beyond impressed with the quality—especially for the price! The material feels sturdy and well-made, and it’s the perfect size for grinding small herbs, spices, etc. The smooth finish makes it easy to clean, but there is a little less friction for grinding which isn’t necessarily a bad thing though. It also looks super cute! Highly recommend!I bought this to grind pills into powder because one of my cats does not view pill pockets as delicious. I find it easy to break up the pill into smaller pieces and then proceed to grind it into powder to put in my cat's food. It is small so no one is going to be doing a medium to large amount of stuff in this. It is perfect for pills and small amounts of spices/herbs. This is a sturdy product that does not weight too much.I haven’t used it yet just got it tonight 11-14-24, so I don’t know how well it will ground up stuff. I got the small one because my storage space is limited. Hopefully it works well.I like everything about this mortar and pestle. It is as described glazed porcelain on the outside. It looks like it will last forever. It is so cute that I want the other two sizes as well.Super happy with this item!great for crushing some medsUse this for crushing aspirin for diy remedies. Small size is perfect.
reviews_1s:
Since this was my FIRST mortal and pestal I had no clue what to expect. But I recently got a real one that's much bigger, made from granite, and a fraction of the value this one goes for. Such a HUGE difference in how they work. I will most likely junk this, it has no real functional use.

Original: Never used a mortar and pestal before but have been getting more into holistic eating and trying things out. I thought I'd try this little one out at first. It is good for simple uses. Like releasing the yummy flavors from herbs without having to smash on your hand or counter then chop. But it sucks for things like hard fenugreek seeds. To crush them I had to pulse down and that's hard to do with how pointy the pestal is at top that will go into your palm. After awhile my arthritic hand gave up. So I'll definitely need something with a better support in the palm. I also think buying one that isn't as smooth on the inside will help with seeds and things that are harder. I was afraid to buy the ones that looked more coarse, but I think that's what's needed.

For people complaining that the inside of them aren't glazed, that's how they work. Any mortar and pestal you buy will need to be this way to crush things properly. That's the point of it. Do your research before buying. There's ways to prevent bacteria growth and cleaning properly. That isn't the reason these should get lower review ratings or returned.

I bought the 3" one and it is small. But I was expecting that for my needs right now. As I stated I'm testing it out first. I don't think this one was anything great but it isn't awful either. If someone didn't have arthritis this might with better for them as well.I immediately noticed that both the bottom interior of the bowl and the part of the stick that you grind with are not sealed. I ground them together for about 30 seconds, and, as expected, there was powered ceramic in the bottom of the bowl. Do not get this for food. Returning immediately.This thing broke from the first use!! It’s more decorative than functional.Small and not able to crush certain items. Too smallDidn't have a chance to try it since it arrived broken.After you crush the pills, the fine powder sticks to the inside of the mortar. It is not fired on the inside bottom! Also, the pestle is not fired on the bottom half and the fine powder sticks to it as well. I am returning mine. I finally ordered 4 different sets. I am returning all but the plastic one. Small and round that is shown in the video. This is a false video! They did not turn enough to crush fully! All of the powder slides out easily. It was only $7 something! Comes in green, pink and yellow (I think). I LOVE THIS ONE!The bottom is very course and everything sticks to it and needs to be scraped outMortar (bowl) was fine— pestle was badly cast and mishapen and lumpy at the grinding end— should be a smooth rounded surface to provide good contact with the bowl. Extremely disappointing to have to waste time returning yet another piece of low quality amazon junk.ToyWorked great for the first 30days, then glaze wore off and the meds now stick to the sides of the mortar and pestle…….
Switching to glass!!!
